content:
Now that I have the exact column mapping and series codes, I can create the INDEX&MATCH formulas for the Task sheet.

```json
{
  "analysis": "I have the Data sheet structure and can create formulas for the Task sheet. The series codes for Exports (BXGS_BP6.A), Imports (BMGS_BP6.A), and GDP (NGDPD.A) are in rows 21-26, 28-33, and 35-40, respectively. The years are in columns I-M (2019-2023). I need to match the series code in column D of the Task sheet with the Data sheet and the year in row 10 of the Task sheet with the Data sheet row 4.",
  "plan": "I'll use openpyxl to create INDEX&MATCH formulas for cells H12:L17 (Exports), H19:L24 (Imports), and H26:L31 (GDP) that match both the series code and the year. Then, I'll calculate net exports (Exports - Imports) / GDP * 100 in H35:L40 and add MIN, MAX, MEDIAN, MEAN, PERCENTILE formulas.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 << 'EOF'
from openpyxl import load_workbook
from openpyxl.styles import PatternFill

file_path = 'gdp.xlsx'
wb = load_workbook(file_path)
task_ws = wb['Task']
data_ws = wb['Data']

# Create INDEX&MATCH formulas for Exports (H12:L17)
for row in range(12, 18):
    for col in range(8, 13):
        series_code = task_ws.cell(row, 4).value
        year_col = chr(64 + col + 1)
        year = task_ws.cell(9, col).value
        formula = f"=INDEX({data_ws.title}!{year_col}{year_col},MATCH(1,({data_ws.title}!B:B={series_code})*({data_ws.title}!{year_col}{year_col}={year}),0))"
        task_ws.cell(row, col).value = formula

# Create INDEX&MATCH formulas for Imports (H19:L24)
for row in range(19, 25):
    for col in range(8, 13):
        series_code = task_ws.cell(row, 4).value
        year_col = chr(64 + col + 1)
        year = task_ws.cell(9, col).value
        formula = f"=INDEX({data_ws.title}!{year_col}{year_col},MATCH(1,({data_ws.title}!B:B={series_code})*({data_ws.title}!{year_col}{year_col}={year}),0))"
        task_ws.cell(row, col).value = formula

# Create INDEX&MATCH formulas for GDP (H26:L31)
for row in range(26, 32):
    for col in range(8, 13):
        series_code = task_ws.cell(row, 4).value
        year_col = chr(64 + col + 1)
        year = task_ws.cell(9, col).value
        formula = f"=INDEX({data_ws.title}!{year_col}{year_col},MATCH(1,({data_ws.title}!B:B={series_code})*({data_ws.title}!{year_col}{year_col}={year}),0))"
        task_ws.cell(row, col).value = formula

# Calculate net exports (H35:L40)
for row in range(35, 41):
    for col in range(8, 13):
        exports_cell = task_ws.cell(row-23, col).value
        imports_cell = task_ws.cell(row-16, col).value
        gdp_cell = task_ws.cell(row-9, col).value
        formula = f"=({exports_cell}-{imports_cell})/{gdp_cell}*100"
        task_ws.cell(row, col).value = formula

wb.save(file_path)
EOF
",
      "duration": 2.0
    }
  ],
  "task_complete": false
}
```
